ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime incident */,
  "crime_date" TEXT /* Date of the crime incident */,
  "total_crime" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes reported on the date */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the crime incident */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the crime incident */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the crime incident */,
  "violent_count" INTEGER /* Number of violent crimes */,
  "theft_count" INTEGER /* Number of thefts */,
  "larceny" INTEGER /* Number of larcenies */,
  "auto_theft" INTEGER /* Number of auto thefts */,
  "assault" INTEGER /* Number of assaults */,
  "burglary" INTEGER /* Number of burglaries */,
  "robbery" INTEGER /* Number of robberies */,
  "arson" INTEGER /* Number of arsons */,
  "homicide" INTEGER /* Number of homicides */,
  "rape" INTEGER /* Number of rapes */,
  "shooting" INTEGER /* Number of shootings */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the crime occurred */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the officer who reported the incident */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the crime incident */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Status of the crime incident (e.g., open, closed, under investigation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "crime_category" TEXT /* Category of the crime type (e.g., violent, property) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the incident data (e.g., investigation, analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident data was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update made */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_updates_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community report */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident reported */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident reported */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the community member who made the report */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the community member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_hotspots" (
  "hotspot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime hotspot */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the hotspot is identified */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type associated with the hotspot */,
  "hotspot_date" TEXT /* Date when the hotspot was identified */,
  "hotspot_description" TEXT /* Description of the hotspot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotspot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_hotspots_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_hotspots_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)
